-DISTVERSION=	0_59

-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/GetLive/${PORTVERSION}%20%28Beta%29
+MASTER_SITES=	http://tardisi.com/distfiles/ \
+		http://lawrencechen.net/distfiles/
 DISTNAME=	GetLive_${DISTVERSION}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
